description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-split-panel

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-split-panel/`

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `list_css_parts`, `list_events`, `list_slots`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Divider color, handle, min sizes. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. Separator role. Keyboard resize (arrow keys). aria-valuenow for position.
3. **Functionality** — Horizontal/vertical. Drag to resize. Min/max panel sizes. Snap positions. Collapse. Initial position.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts (divider, handle). Cursor styles. Responsive.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All API documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Drag. Keyboard resize. Min/max. Collapse. Snap.
8. **Storybook** — Horizontal/vertical. Collapsible. Nested. With content.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Layout tool. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-split-panel
